description: Happy path: soft-delete a small batch of memories by explicit id list. Default hard_delete=false retains rows with deleted_at set for the audit trail.
notes: Response shape is not defined verbatim in the kickoff spec — see Editor's note in docs/spec/v0.md §3.3 for the inferred shape used here (forgotten_ids, hard_delete echo, per-store {store, count, error?} aggregate). The audit log row is written regardless of hard_delete value.
